notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons flow and wording remain from CC7.5.10/CC7.5.11.
Gift flow remains 6 steps: channel -> post -> gift title -> gift content -> access mode -> review/save.
After gift title/content/photo/file is sent by user, the next gift menu is sent as a fresh bottom message, not edited above the user's input.
Older gift menus are cleaned up after user input; the user's own text/photo/file is not deleted.
Comment counter refresh now preserves saved admin add-ons: comments button + CTA button + gift row are rebuilt together from Postgres.
Gift and button rows should no longer disappear after adding a new comment.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
